positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration featuring a geometric-abstract arrangement of mountains and flowing rivers, executed in a clean, thick-line silhouette style. The composition should be centrally framed, suitable for apparel printing. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and creamy beige. The artistic style should evoke modern travel posters and graphic design, with solid color blocking and crisp edges. The primary focus is the harmonious, symmetrical balance between the stylized peaks and the sweeping curves of the water, designed for high-contrast reproduction on fabric. --ar 1:1 --s 750
